inputs.label: Initial Capital Investment
inputs.businessContext: The upfront capital cost required for the process improvement or new equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upfront capital cost required for the process improvement or new equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süreç iyileştirme veya yeni ekipman için gereken peşin sermaye maliyeti.

inputs.label: Annual Cost Savings
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual reduction in operating costs (e.g., labor, materials, energy) from the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual reduction in operating costs (e.g., labor, materials, energy) from the investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımdan beklenen yıllık işletme maliyeti azalması (ör. işçilik, malzeme, enerji).

inputs.label: Project Life
inputs.businessContext: The number of years over which the investment will generate savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of years over which the investment will generate savings.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: The annual discount rate reflecting the cost of capital or required rate of return.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annual discount rate reflecting the cost of capital or required rate of return.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sermaye maliyetini veya gerekli getiri oranını yansıtan yıllık iskonto oranı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
